summary: Phase 35 review — backend 10/10 PASS via /app/backend/tests/test_phase35.py (war-room terminal exclusion + KPI integrity, AI suggest-actions schema/empty-text, email-scheduler status, system-setting toggle round-trip, all 4 manual dispatch endpoints, commercial type round-trip). Frontend partial PASS — lead-detail renames verified ('Discussions (0)', 'Customer Follow-Ups', 'Action Items (0)'); Action Items form datetime-local + reminder dropdown verified and task creation succeeded; Customer Follow-Ups form exposes followup-time-input[type=time] + reminder-select; EmailSchedulerPanel renders with 3 status pills (Scheduler/Loop/ZeptoMail), 4 stat cards (Sent 24 / Failed 0 / Pending FU 2 / Pending Action 0), 4 dispatch buttons (scheduler-dispatch-followups/tasks/weekly/monthly), recent log table, and scheduler-toggle PUT to /api/system-settings/email_scheduler_enabled succeeded (visible toast 'Email scheduler paused — no reminders will be sent').

integration_issues.issue: Could not visually verify the [data-testid=ai-action-suggestions] panel from the UI within 45s after posting a discussion comment via the placeholder input. The discussion did not appear in the list (Discussions counter stayed at 0), suggesting the submit button auto-resolved by the test (sibling-button heuristic) did not trigger CommentInputWithMentions.onSubmit. Backend POST /api/leads/{id}/ai/suggest-actions itself is healthy (10/10 backend tests pass and returns the documented schema). Recommend testing E2E with a real user gesture or exposing a stable data-testid on the comment submit button (e.g., 'submit-comment-btn').

FollowUpsCard uses a 'Pick a date' popover (Calendar component) rather than a native <input type=date>, so the existing form validation throws 'Please select a date' when only the time field is filled via testid. The time + reminder testids are correct; no fix required but documenting for the next agent — to create a follow-up via Playwright the test must click a preset chip (e.g., data-testid='preset-tomorrow') instead of trying to type into a date input.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='submit-comment-btn' to the discussion send-icon button inside CommentInputWithMentions so frontend tests can reliably trigger AI Action Suggestions without scanning sibling buttons.

OPTIONAL: Document in CommentsCard that posting a discussion auto-fires analyze() (which calls /ai/suggest-actions) — the panel is rendered conditionally on aiData, so first-time UX may show a brief gap while the LLM responds (8–15s typical).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L5874-5913 _classify_war_room_bucket: terminal-name exclusion list matches the review brief exactly ('dead','disqualified','lost','closed lost','closed-lost'). Verified KPI total_leads == sum(bucket counts) on live data — the all-or-nothing classification invariant holds.

server.py L6887-6945 ai_suggest_actions: input validation (len<5 → empty arrays), priority/due_days clamp (0-90, 1-90), title/notes length caps, and pending_with allow-list ['customer','selling_partner'] are all defensive. Time merge into ISO via regex ^\d{2}:\d{2}$ is safe.

server.py L9374-9421 admin_email_scheduler_status: cleanly returns enabled+loop_running+zeptomail_configured+stats_7d+pending+recent_logs and pops raw `created_at` before sending (no datetime serialization issue).

server.py L8334-8359 system-settings GET/PUT: GET defaults email_scheduler_enabled=True when no row (UI never blank on first toggle), PUT allow-listed against {send_emails_to_customers, email_scheduler_enabled}. Upsert + updated_by tracked.
EmailSchedulerPanel.jsx: 4 stat cards visible at runtime show live values (Sent=24, Failed=0, PendingFU=2, PendingTask=0). Pause toast wording is good ('no reminders will be sent').
TasksCard.jsx L154-160: due-date input is type=datetime-local AND a reminder Select with data-testid='task-reminder-select' — both confirmed live. Task creation persisted (rows count went 0→1 in UI).
FollowUpsCard.jsx L136-172: time input type=time and reminder-select are present and correctly wired.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (renames, datetime/time/reminder testids, scheduler panel, scheduler-toggle + dispatch all verified; AI panel auto-trigger via UI was not visually observed but backend path proven)

seed_data_creation: Test created one Action Item titled 'TEST_Phase35 Task' on lead e3dbb555-… and toggled the scheduler off/on round-trip (restored). No DB rows left in an inconsistent state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://vyapaar-preview-1.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_phase35.py -v. For the AI-suggestions UI integration, post a discussion via a real user gesture or add a stable data-testid to the comment submit button. Note that follow-up creation requires clicking a preset chip (preset-tomorrow etc.) — there is no native date input. Commercials list was empty in the preview environment during this run; the Change-Type dialog code & testids exist (verified in source) and the backend PATCH /api/commercials/{id} with {type:'recurring'|'one_time'} succeeded round-trip.
rca of the issue: AI-suggestions UI not visually observed because (a) Discussions counter remained 0 after the heuristic 'click sibling button' which suggests the heuristic clicked a non-submit button, and (b) CommentInputWithMentions.onSubmit doesn't have an exposed data-testid for the submit affordance. Backend path is fully healthy (proven by test_suggest_actions_returns_structure and the no-op test). No app bug — purely a Playwright selector gap.
